name: BB:UBA : Gotomypc Process Creation and Openvpn File Creation
notes: This BB tracks whenever GoToMyPC process or OpenVPN file has been created
bb_references: BB:UBA : Gotomypc Process Creation and Openvpn File Creation on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event matches "Process CommandLine" IMATCHES '(g2tray\.exe)’ OR "Filename" IMATCHES '.*\.(ovpn)' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY BB:UBA : Gotomypc Process Creation and Openvpn File Creation on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event matches "Process CommandLine" IMATCHES '(g2tray\.exe)’ OR "Filename" IMATCHES '.*\.(ovpn)' AQL filter query
